query:
-- Step 1: Change to varchar to allow any value
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts` CHANGE COLUMN `status` `status` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent';
-- Step 2: Update values
UPDATE `school_contacts` SET `status` = 'not_sent' WHERE `status` IN ('Pending', 'pending', 'Follow-up Sent', 'Sent', 'Responded', 'Archived');
-- Step 3: Rename and change to correct enum
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts` CHANGE COLUMN `status` `schoolOutreachStatus` ENUM('not_sent','sent','responded','no_reply','meeting') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent';
-- Step 4: Rename region to district
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts` CHANGE COLUMN `region` `district` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '';
-- Step 5: Add missing columns
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastEmailedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpDate` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyNotes` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyReceivedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `internalNotes` TEXT NULL;

-- Step 1: Change to varchar to allow any value
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts` CHANGE COLUMN `status` `status` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent';
-- Step 2: Update values
UPDATE `school_contacts` SET `status` = 'not_sent' WHERE `status` IN ('Pending', 'pending', 'Follow-up Sent', 'Sent', 'Responded', 'Archived');
-- Step 3: Rename and change to correct enum
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts` CHANGE COLUMN `status` `schoolOutreachStatus` ENUM('not_sent','sent','responded','no_reply','meeting') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent';
-- Step 4: Rename region to district
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts` CHANGE COLUMN `region` `district` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '';
-- Step 5: Add missing columns
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastEmailedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpDate` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyNotes` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyReceivedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `internalNotes` TEXT NULL;
